title: Front Office Manager - Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services!
